Rent vs Buy Calculator

Compare the financial costs of renting versus buying. Enter your details to see which option is better for your situation.

FAQ

Is it cheaper to rent or buy?

It depends on location, how long you stay, home appreciation, and interest rates. Generally, buying is better if you stay 5+ years.

What costs does buying include?

Buying costs include mortgage payments, property tax, insurance, maintenance (1-2% of home value/year), PMI, and closing costs.

What is the 5-year rule?

The 5-year rule suggests buying only if you plan to stay at least 5 years, allowing time to recoup closing costs and build equity.
